name: Money One
description_short: Money One Federal Credit Union offers online and mobile banking with 24/7 account access, bill pay, and fund transfers for members in Maryland.
description_long:
Money One Federal Credit Union is a credit union serving members in the Largo and Upper Marlboro, Maryland area. As a member-owned financial institution, it provides traditional banking services with a focus on digital accessibility and member benefits. The credit union operates with a community-based model typical of federal credit unions, emphasizing member service and affordable financial products.

Money One's primary digital offerings center on Online Banking and iPay Online Bill Pay, which enable members to access accounts 24/7 from computers, tablets, and smartphones. The platform allows members to pay loan accounts (including Money One credit cards and auto loans), transfer funds between accounts, make mobile check deposits, track transaction history, and set up automatic recurring payments. All core online banking features are offered free to members with no stated fees or minimums mentioned on their online banking page.

Money One distinguishes itself through the integration of iPay Online Bill Pay, which allows members to pay individuals, utilities, and other bills directly from their account. The credit union provides customizable text alerts for account monitoring and maintains member support through phone (301-925-4600) available Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm, plus online contact options. The emphasis on free services suggests a member-first approach compared to some traditional banks.

A honest assessment reveals that Money One's web presence focuses narrowly on online banking features without detailed information about savings accounts, checking account types, CD rates, loan products, membership eligibility, or fee structures. The website does not provide APY rates, loan terms, or comparative product information. As a regional credit union, membership may be restricted by geography or affiliation requirements not specified on this page. The limited digital information available suggests this credit union may serve a traditional membership base that values in-branch relationships alongside digital access.
services: Mobile banking on tablet and smartphone
iPay Online Bill Pay for individuals and utilities
Loan account payments (credit cards and auto loans)
pros: Free Online Banking access for all members with 24/7 real-time account access
Free mobile check deposits available through the online platform
iPay Online Bill Pay allows payments to individuals and utilities at no cost
Free automatic recurring payment setup for consistent bill management
Customizable text alerts for transaction monitoring and account security
Free instant fund transfers between accounts
Free transaction history tracking and account reconciliation tools
cons: No information provided about savings account types, interest rates, or APY
Website does not specify membership eligibility requirements or geographic restrictions
No details on loan products, rates, terms, or credit card benefits beyond online payment capability
Minimal product transparency—no fee schedule, minimum balance requirements, or account comparison tools available
best_for: Maryland-based residents in the Largo and Upper Marlboro areas seeking credit union membership
Members who prioritize mobile and online banking convenience with 24/7 digital access
Existing Money One members looking to enroll in or learn about online banking features
Consumers seeking bill pay and fund transfer capabilities without online banking fees
diagnosis: Money One Federal Credit Union is best for Maryland-area residents who are already members or eligible to join and want straightforward online banking with free bill pay and mobile access. The main caveat is that the website provides minimal information about actual products (savings accounts, checking accounts, loan terms, rates), making it impossible to compare Money One's offerings or costs against competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
